title: Zunkiree Search

title: Stella
description: Autonomous AI agents that handle the entire customer buying journey—from product discovery to checkout. Built for ecommerce businesses in Nepal and globally with eSewa, Khalti, and international payment support.

title: Zenly
description: Smart scheduling that handles complex availability, multi-resource bookings, and automatic conflict resolution. Reduce no-shows by 35% with AI-powered reminders.

title: AI CRM
description: Customer relationship management powered by AI. Predicts customer needs, automates outreach, and surfaces insights that drive revenue growth.

title: Gaamma
description: End-to-end manufacturing intelligence for modern factories. Unifies operations from raw materials to finished goods with real-time visibility and predictive insights.

title: Dental AI Assistant
description: AI assistant designed for dental operations and patient interaction. Streamlines appointment scheduling, patient communication, and practice management.
